notes: Switchable video walls: the Canlı page now has wall tabs (a main editable wall plus every saved layout), switching keeps tiles alive so cameras no longer re-dial, and walls are deletable with confirmation. Recordings: no more auto-opening a camera on entry, sync playback fixed (the shared timeline now drives every camera), and a black pane now explains itself — loading spinner or an H.265 notice. Every delete action in the app now asks for confirmation.
